design_philosophy: A secure, warm, and field-friendly 'second brain' for dental/medical Territory Managers. Avoid the cold, rigid corporate CRM look. Use earthy tones that evoke trust, growth, and calm. Prioritize mobile-first, thumb-driven layouts for fast on-the-go interaction.

rules: No Inter or generic sans for headings.
Use font-light or font-black for headings to create tension.
Do not exceed text-6xl for maximum heading size.

grid_system.style: The 'Control Room' Grid for dashboards. Dense, data-correlated, scanable.

rules: Mobile-first responsive always. Use thumb-zone interface planning (bottom navigation, easily reachable CTAs).
Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.
Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile.

surfaces_and_components.cards: Flat solid background, 1px subtle border (border-[#E2DCD0]), max 8px border-radius (rounded-md). NO drop shadows by default. Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-sm.
surfaces_and_components.glassmorphism: Avoid glassmorphism for health apps data views. Use Solid Backgrounds to prevent visual refraction of clinical data.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Primary: Solid #274035 with white text. Secondary: Solid #F4F1EA with #274035 text. Hover must explicitly set lighter background and ensure contrast.
surfaces_and_components.forms: Use Shadcn components heavily customized to earthy colors. Never use native inputs.
surfaces_and_components.navigation: Header must have solid background. Mobile should favor bottom tab bars or thumb-friendly floating action buttons.
surfaces_and_components.icons: Use lucide-react. Keep stroke width consistent.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Always explicitly set text color on hover. Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interaction.focus_states: Must have higher contrast. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:outline-none.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Staggered entrance for list items. Micro-interactions for saving or logging visits (<60s feedback loop).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for text, 3:1 for large text and interactive elements.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='log-visit-btn').

rules: Use real photos or high-quality abstract backgrounds. No placeholder services (via.placeholder.com).
Hero image overlays max opacity bg-black/40 or bg-white/40.

login_background.description: Soft flowing abstract 3D shapes with a warm neutral tone, ideal for login background.

doctor_profile_placeholder.description: Medical professionals discussing matters in natural light.

clinic_placeholder.description: Contemporary dental office interior with stylish design.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design a Field Intelligence Platform, NOT a CRM. It should feel like a 'secure second brain'.
Focus on a mobile-first TM Dashboard with a prominent quick 'Log Visit' button.
Use Shadcn UI components but strip the Vercel look. Apply the earthy, flat styling defined in surfaces_and_components.
Implement progressive data summarization: show customer status at the top with a single indicator (e.g., sentiment).
Ensure the 'Log Visit' flow is optimized for <60 seconds completion on mobile.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to ALL interactive elements.
Apply Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) colors strictly. No generic SaaS blue or tech mint.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for creative layouts, but rely on Shadcn for interactive logic (Forms, Dialogs).
